_comment: Local-dev default only. Azure App Service Application Settings (including ConnectionStrings__VlmsDatabase) are injected as environment variables into a co-located WebJob's process automatically, same as adr/0003-scheduled-jobs-webjobs.md's 'shares the App Service plan' consequence — this file is not the production configuration source.

Safeguarding._comment: low-level-design.md calls the consent/DBS expiry warning window 'configurable'; 28 is the documented build-time default (ConsentExpiryJob.DefaultExpiryWarningWindowDays) — override here or via the equivalent Azure App Service Application Setting (Safeguarding__ExpiryWarningWindowDays) without a recompile.
